# DDW Studio — AI Automation & Custom Software

DDW Studio (Digital Dream Works LLC) is a technology company headquartered in St. Petersburg, Florida, USA, with European operations serving Italy and the EU via ddwstudio.it.

## What We Build

We design and deploy AI-first business systems: agentic AI networks, custom ERP platforms, voice AI receptionists, fleet management software, and industry-specific automation.

## Products

- **LYRA** — AI voice receptionist for automated inbound call handling (lyrabyddw.com)
- **FleetOS** — Fleet management & AI dispatch platform (fleetosbyddw.com / fleetosbyddw.it)
- **HR-OS** — AI-powered HRIS, onboarding, and workforce automation
- **Sviluppiamo.dev** — Custom software development for Italian SMEs

## Solutions

- **Agentic AI Systems** — Multi-agent orchestration for complex business workflows
- **Custom ERP** — Industry-specific enterprise resource planning built from scratch
- **AI Automation** — Process automation, document processing, lead qualification
- **Custom Software** — Full-stack web and mobile applications

## Industries Served

Logistics & Supply Chain, HVAC & Field Services, Real Estate, Construction, Franchise Operations, Marine, Maritime & Port Operations, Wealth Management, Professional Services

## Company

- Website: https://ddwstudio.com (EN) | https://ddwstudio.it (IT)
